anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1130: Luffy vs. Imu Showdown Leaks
anime_pulse_items.summary: New spoilers reveal Luffy's Gear 5 clash with Imu, with a flashback to the Void Century. Chapter drops in Weekly Shonen Jump on May 18. Fans are exploding over the implications for the final saga.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note 20th Anniversary: Netflix Live-Action Series Greenlit
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix announces a new Death Note live-action series for 2027, with Stranger Things creators attached. Original voice actors may return for dub. Anniversary merch drops on Crunchyroll Store.

anime_pulse_items.title: Boruto TBV Chapter 15: Kawaki's Betrayal Triggers New War
anime_pulse_items.summary: Kawaki kills a key ally, sending Konoha into chaos. Boruto unlocks a new dojutsu. Manga sales spike 200% on Amazon Japan.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball Daima Episode 7: Goku Mini vs. Demon King
anime_pulse_items.summary: New episode aired today on Crunchyroll; Goku Mini unlocks a new transformation. Fans debate if this connects to Super. Merch pre-orders for Daima figures sell out.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Trailer: Culling Games Arc Finale
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA drops trailer showing Yuji vs. Sukuna final battle. Release date July 2026. Twitter trends #JJK3 for 6 hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer Infinity Castle Movie: First 10 Minutes Released Online
anime_pulse_items.summary: Aniplex leaks opening scene of the movie trilogy. Ufotable animation praised. Movie premieres in Japan June 2026. Box office tracking $200M+.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Chapters Part 3 Blu-ray Hits #1 on Amazon
anime_pulse_items.summary: Collector's edition with new post-credits scene sells out in hours. Fan theories about alternate timeline confirmed by Isayama interview.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Chapter 430: Deku vs. All For One Final Clash
anime_pulse_items.summary: Manga ends next week; current chapter shows Deku losing an arm. Horikoshi teases sequel series. Fan art floods Pixiv.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2: New Key Visual & October 2026 Release
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA reveals Reze arc visual. Cast additions announced. Crunchyroll to simulcast. Hype meter off the charts.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3: Episode 1 Streams on Netflix Today
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix releases season 3 premiere globally. Anya's new school arc begins. Original episode count 25. Fans rejoice.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren Season 2 Confirmed for January 2027
anime_pulse_items.summary: Madhouse announces season 2 after awards sweep. New teaser shows Frieren's past. Manga volume 14 sells 1M copies first week.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Jeju Island Arc Drops on Crunchyroll
anime_pulse_items.summary: First two episodes released today. Animation by A-1 Pictures. Manhwa fans compare adaptation. #SoloLeveling trends worldwide.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Announces Summer 2026 Simulcast Lineup
anime_pulse_items.summary: 30 new titles including 'Oshi no Ko' season 2, 'Mob Psycho 100' season 4, and 'Vinland Saga' season 3. Schedule posted.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'The One Piece' Live-Action Season 2 Casting Revealed
anime_pulse_items.summary: New actors for Chopper and Robin announced. Filming begins June 2026. Iñaki Godoy returns as Luffy. Fan reactions mixed.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit AMA: Death Note Author Tsugumi Ohba Answers Fan Questions
anime_pulse_items.summary: Ohba discusses alternate endings, L's past, and new one-shot. Post gets 50k upvotes in 2 hours. Subreddit r/deathnote hits 1M subscribers.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan Spin-off 'Bad Boy' Manga Launches in June
anime_pulse_items.summary: New series by original author's assistant focuses on Levi's past. Teaser art released. Kodansha to publish.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Mobile Game Launches Worldwide
anime_pulse_items.summary: Gacha game by Netmarble hits iOS/Android. Includes original story. $5M revenue in first day. Players complain about rates.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball: Sparking! Zero DLC Adds GT Characters
anime_pulse_items.summary: Super Saiyan 4 Gogeta and Omega Shenron join roster. Patch notes released. Competitive scene reacts.
